intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把姐姐远在 Nigeria、明年回来、房子已经建好、现代房子在地区里显得特别这条时间线读顺。

sentences.text: In her letter, she said that she would come to England next year.
sentences.focus_zh: said that she would come 是过去信里说的未来；England 是她明年要来的地方。

sentences.text: If she comes, she will get a surprise.
sentences.focus_zh: If she comes -> she will get a surprise，是一个真实可能发生的未来条件。

sentences.text: We are now living in a beautiful new house in the country.
sentences.focus_zh: in the country 在这课里是乡下、乡间，不是国家。

sentences.text: Work on it had begun before my sister left.
sentences.focus_zh: had begun before 说明房子动工早于姐姐离开，是更早发生的事。

sentences.text: The house was completed five months ago.
sentences.focus_zh: was completed 是被动语态，重点是房子五个月前建好了。

sentences.text: It is a very modern house, so it looks strange to some people.
sentences.focus_zh: modern 是风格新；strange 是不熟悉、显得特别，不是坏或丑。

sentences.text: It must be the only modern house in the district.
sentences.focus_zh: must be 是强推测；district 是附近地区、local area。
